name: Kentucky Apple Festival Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core and slice 7 Granny Smith apples.
2. Lightly mix cinnamon and sugar with the apples.
3. Heap the mixture into a pastry-lined pie pan.
4. Dot with 1 1/2 tbsp butter.
5. Cover with topping crust; slit to allow steam to escape.
6. Bake at 425 degrees for 60 to 75 minutes.
